metadata.name: Synchrophasor Data Analysis for Oscillation Detection

description: An engineer analyzes high-speed synchrophasor (PMU) data to detect potentially harmful oscillations on the power grid.

nodes.task_description: Stream and process real-time PMU data from multiple locations on the grid.

expected_outcome.expected: System is ingesting and time-aligning the PMU data.

nodes.task_description: Apply a signal processing algorithm (like the Prony method) to the data to identify any poorly damped electromechanical oscillations.

expected_outcome.expected: The algorithm detects a low-frequency oscillation between two groups of power plants.

nodes.task_description: Alert the system operator to the oscillation and recommend tuning a power system stabilizer on a specific generator to add damping and resolve the issue.

expected_outcome.expected: Engineer provides an actionable recommendation to the operator.
